prompt: Generate a clear diagram illustrating a customer service process, using the minimalist icon style and bright color palette of the reference image on a simple white background.
prompt_refined: Generate a clear, two-dimensional diagram illustrating a customer service process. The diagram should feature minimalist icons and a bright, distinct color palette, consistent with the style seen in image 1 (e.g., prominent use of blues, purples, and reds). Use clean, straight lines to connect the different process steps. All elements should be presented on a simple white background. Each step or component of the customer service process must be represented by a clear, appropriately labeled icon.
objects: Minimalist icons representing customer service process steps
Text labels for customer service process steps
